info.name: gestionFactures API
info.description:
Invoice management REST API — Node.js / Express / MongoDB / JWT

## Order to follow:
1. Auth → Register
2. Auth → Login  → copy token → paste in collection Variables tab under 'token'
3. Suppliers → Create Supplier  → copy _id from response → paste in 'supplier_id'
4. Invoices → Create Invoice  → copy _id from response → paste in 'invoice_id'
5. Payments → Add Payment
6. Everything else in any order

variable.description: Base URL — change port if needed
Paste JWT token here after Login

item.name: 1 - Health
item.description: Check that the server is running.

request.description: Returns { message, status } if server is up.

item.name: 2 - Auth
item.description:
Register, login and get current user.

After Login: copy the token value from the response, go to the collection Variables tab and paste it in the 'token' row.

request.description: Create a new account. Requires name, email, password, password_confirmation.

item.name: Login
item.description:
Returns a JWT token.

After sending: copy the 'token' value from the response body, then go to the collection Variables tab and paste it in the 'token' row under Current Value.

request.description: Returns the logged-in user's profile. Requires Bearer token in {{token}}.

item.name: 3 - Suppliers
item.description:
Manage suppliers. Must be logged in.

After Create Supplier: copy the '_id' from the response and paste it in the collection Variables tab under 'supplier_id'.

item.name: Create Supplier
item.description:
Creates a supplier linked to the logged-in user.

After sending: copy '_id' from the response and paste it in the collection Variables tab under 'supplier_id'.

item.name: Get All Suppliers
item.description: Returns all suppliers belonging to the logged-in user.

item.name: Get One Supplier
item.description: Returns a single supplier by ID from {{supplier_id}}.

item.name: Update Supplier
item.description: Update any field of a supplier. Only send the fields you want to change.

item.name: Supplier Stats
item.description: Returns invoice totals, paid/remaining amounts and status breakdown for this supplier.

item.name: Delete Supplier
item.description: Deletes the supplier. Make sure its invoices are deleted first.

item.name: 4 - Invoices
item.description:
Manage invoices. Requires an existing supplier in {{supplier_id}}.

After Create Invoice: copy '_id' from response.invoice and paste it in the collection Variables tab under 'invoice_id'.

item.name: Create Invoice
item.description:
Creates an invoice for a supplier. Uses {{supplier_id}} in the body.

After sending: copy '_id' from response.invoice and paste it in the collection Variables tab under 'invoice_id'.

item.name: Get All Invoices
item.description: Returns all invoices for the logged-in user. Supplier info is populated.

item.name: Get One Invoice
item.description: Returns a single invoice by ID with populated supplier info.

item.name: Update Invoice
item.description: Update amount, dueDate or details. Cannot update a paid invoice.

item.name: Delete Invoice
item.description: Deletes an invoice. Blocked if the invoice has payments attached.

item.name: 5 - Payments
item.description: Add payments to an invoice. Invoice status updates automatically: unpaid → partially_paid → paid.

item.name: Add Payment
item.description:
Adds a payment to the invoice in {{invoice_id}}.
Invoice status updates based on total paid vs invoice amount:
- partial amount → partially_paid
- exact full amount → paid

item.name: Get Payments
item.description: Returns all payments for the invoice in {{invoice_id}}.

item.name: 6 - Dashboard
item.description: Global statistics for the logged-in user across all suppliers and invoices.

item.name: Get Dashboard
item.description: Returns total invoices, total amount, paid, remaining, overdue count, status breakdown and top 3 suppliers by amount.
